violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as milks and vegetables in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

Frozen desserts and bakery items packaged in the food establishment are lacking all required information on food labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the name of the food source for each major allergen contained in the food unless the food source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
Gaskets at the 1 door lowboys were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The doors to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
